properties.DETAILS_PAGE_DESCRIPTION:
Mūsu klubs ir veidots ar mērķi dot tev to, ko tu jau sen esi pelnījis – vietu, kur ikviens var justies gaidīts, motivēts un iedvesmots. Šeit satiksies tie, kuri grib attīstīties, pārvarēt sevi un vienkārši izbaudīt sportošanu.
Tiekamies laukumos, Tiekamies treniņos!
Closest Padel club to city center

Izbaudi visstraujāk augošo rakešu sporta veidu pasaulē Rēzeknē. Lielisks sporta veids gan iesācējiem, gan pieredzējušiem spēlētājiem. Pavadi laiku kopā ar draugiem un ģimenes locekļiem kā arī satiec jaunus cilvēkus.

Indoor padel tennis club with 12 courts and a 15-meter ceiling height, ensuring a spacious environment, excellent visibility, and high-quality play all year round, equipped with a modern and professional LED lighting system (LGH13)
Probably the best outdoor courts in the Latvia.

Meet Lil Padel, private indoor court designed for games or events.
✔️ Almost 12m high ceiling
✔️ LED lighting
✔️ Fully indoor and private
✔️ Smart access

address.street: Biķeru iela 4, Ulbroka, Stopiņu pagasts, Ropažu novads

properties.DETAILS_PAGE_DESCRIPTION:
Enjoy your game in a modern and comfortable club environment!
Individuals from the age of 15 who are not a MyFitness member, a €5 entrance fee applies at the club. 
You’ll have access not only to Padel courts but also to the gym, group classes (as long as places are available), and the sauna for relaxation.
Use of the Padel courts and/or watching games is permitted for individuals from the age of 7. Children aged 7 to 14 must be accompanied by an adult.

Racket and ball rental – €5. Balls can be purchased on-site.

By entering MyFitness Sāga, you agree to comply with the MyFitness Sports Clubs Internal Rules (https://www.myfitness.lv/en/documents/myfitness-sports-clubs-regulations/)
You can read the Padel Booking Rules here (https://www.myfitness.lv/en/documents/myfitness-padel-rules/)
Padel by MyFitness WhatsApp group is available here ( https://chat.whatsapp.com/Iw702Z5f04PJnKQuVT0YHV) .

properties.DETAILS_PAGE_DESCRIPTION:
A new padel club in Pārdaugava featuring **15 courts** and a cozy, thoughtfully designed environment.
A great atmosphere, saunas in the locker rooms, water stations between the courts, a comfortable lounge area, and professional coaches.
Created for players’ well-being.

New indoor padel club located in the heart of Riga at Rimi Olympic Centre.
We offer 4 double courts and 1 single court, all with premium turf and full glass walls for the best playing experience.
Open daily, monday to sunday, 7:00AM -23:00PM — easy online booking on playtomic.io 
Come play at one of the top padel spots in Riga!

## **OpenPadel Ādaži, Latvija — Āra padel laukumi**
Pirmie profesionālie āra padel laukumi ar modernu aprīkojumu Ādažos. Moderna infrastruktūra, vienkārša rezervācija un draudzīga atmosfēra.
Padel 76 Valmierā ir izcila vieta padela spēlētājiem ar kvalitatīvu laukumu, draudzīgu vidi un lielisku spēles pieredzi. Trenējies, sacenties un satiec domubiedrus – pievienojies padela kustībai!

6 state of the art Indoor Padel courts, 2 panorama outdoor courts. 3 indoor golf simulators. 
Auto stāvvietu izmaiņas K9!
Sākot no šodien (Ceturtdien 25.06) nomainīs bruģas K9 stāvvietā. 
Kamēr notiek remonta darbi, varat A/M novietot Europark stāvvieta Ķīšezera iela 11 BEZ MAKSAS! Neko nav jāatzīmē, neko appā nav jareģistrē.

Welcome to Padel Club Riga Ganību dambis - 2 outdoor courts!
The Club operates online, there are no staff on site. No locker rooms or toilets on site
**No rental rackets available************!************! **Bring your own balls. Lights are not connected yet. 
All payments are via Playtomic or bank transfer. 
No cash payments
Please contact our admin if you have any questions: 26553324, info@padel.lv
For trainings and tournaments call 26553324
Beautiful court in the middle of the Sigulda scenery. Come and play on our Mondo turf and enjoy Sigulda in the sporty manner.

Brand new padel club in Teika district. 
Parking for clents is FREE for 3 hours (need to register at the reception).
RN PADEL CLUB piedāvā 2 modernus padel tenisa kortus, kā arī atpūtas zonu, kur sporta entuziasti, ģimenes un draugi var satikties, baudīt aktīvu atpūtu un piederību kopienai.
New modern indoor padel club in Riga. Free parking, full kitchen and bar.
